designNotes.colorScheme: Light theme — white body (#fff), dark footer (rgb(37,37,42) ≈ #25252a), frosted-glass nav (rgba white 0.85)
designNotes.typography: Headings: DM Sans Variable 48px; Body/UI: Inter Variable 16px; dark text rgb(61,61,71)
designNotes.heroPattern: Full-viewport hero with animated cycling action words (AUTOMATE/AUGMENT/ANALYZE) below H1, no paragraph subhead
designNotes.logoBarPlacement: Immediately below hero — multiple industry-tab variations of the social proof bar
designNotes.productNav: Three pillars in sticky/scroll products section: AI Agent / Agent Assist / Conversation Intelligence
designNotes.metricsCallouts: 5.5x Higher containment, 23% Higher CSAT — bold stat callouts in use-case cards
designNotes.ctaStrategy: Primary CTA throughout: 'Get a demo' → /request-a-demo; secondary CTAs: 'See the results', 'Explore [product]'
designNotes.testimonialSection: Single large testimonial quote with name/title, scroll-driven carousel
designNotes.integrations: Dedicated integrations section near bottom — ecosystem play
